phrases.intent_en: Ask how to climb up to the old castle tower
phrases.text_local: Comment monter jusqu'à la tour du château dans le Suquet ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN mon-TAY zhooss-KAH lah TOOR doo sha-TOH dan leh soo-KAY
phrases.cultural_note: Le Suquet crowns a hill above the port. The medieval Tour du Suquet offers panoramic views over Cannes bay.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a restaurant serving traditional Provençal food
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me recommander un restaurant servant une cuisine provençale traditionnelle ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo meh reh-ko-man-DAY un res-to-RAN sehr-VAN oon kwee-ZEEN pro-van-SAL trah-dee-syo-NEL
phrases.cultural_note: The winding streets of Le Suquet are lined with intimate restaurants — more authentic and less expensive than La Croisette.

responses.english: There are several on the street.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah ploo-ZYUHR dahn lah ROO
responses.local: Il y en a plusieurs dans la rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is open and what the entry fee is
phrases.text_local: Le musée est-il ouvert et combien coûte l'entrée ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh moo-ZAY eh-TEEL oo-VEHR ay kohm-BYEHN KOOT lahn-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée de la Castre is housed in the medieval château at the top of Le Suquet hill.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the best time is to visit for the view over La Croisette
phrases.text_local: À quel moment de la journée la vue sur La Croisette est-elle la plus belle ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel mo-MAN deh lah zhoor-NAY lah VYOO soor lah kwah-ZET eh-TEL lah ploo BEL
phrases.cultural_note: Sunset from Le Suquet is one of Cannes' most stunning views — the bay turns golden as the sun sets over the Esterel hills.

responses.phonetic: ahn fehn dah-preh-mee-DEE, poor luh koo-SHAY duh soh-LAY
responses.local: En fin d'après-midi, pour le coucher de soleil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the church on the hill is open to visitors
phrases.text_local: L'église sur la colline est-elle ouverte aux visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay-GLEEZ soor lah ko-LEEN eh-TEL oo-VEHRT oh vee-zee-TUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Notre-Dame de l'Espérance at the summit of Le Suquet dates from the 17th century and is freely accessible.
